code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut product = 1
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)

while i < n
  match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut sign = 1
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if b == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut num = 0
      mut digit_running = true
      while digit_running and i < n
        match string.byte_at(line, i)
        when Some(c)
          if c >= 48 and c <= 57
            num = num * 10 + (c - 48)
            i = i + 1
          else
            digit_running = false
          end
        when None
          digit_running = false
        end
      end
      product = product * sign * num
    end
  when None
    i = i + 1
  end
end

println("product=#{product}")
